subject: Lilligant, a bipedal grass-type Pokemon with a large flower on its head and leaf-like skirt, dancing in a sunny meadow
description: A slender bipedal plant creature stands in a bright outdoor meadow, its body composed of green leaves forming a skirt-like lower half and a large floral bloom crowning its head. The figure's posture is light and upright, suggesting a dancing or prancing motion. Large orange and red flowers fill the foreground, while a blue sky with white clouds completes the cheerful backdrop. The overall impression is of a graceful botanical creature in its natural habitat.
foreground: Plant creature with leafy skirt and floral crown, surrounded by large orange and red flowers
background: Open meadow with green grass and blue sky with white clouds
emotion: graceful, light, upright posture suggesting joy or dancing
